new_articles.title: South Korea’s favourite AI stocks slide again, drag Kospi index down 8%
new_articles.summary: Samsung Electronics, SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'South Korea’s favourite AI stocks slide again, drag Kospi index down 8%'이다. Heavyweights Samsung Electronics and SK Hynix, which together account for more than half of Kospi's market cap, fell around 9% each on Friday, forcing the exchange to trigger circuit breakers and halt trading for roughly 20 minutes. Heavyweights Samsung Electronics and SK Hynix, which together account for more than half of Kospi's market cap, fell around 9% each on Friday, forcing the exchange to trigger circuit breakers and halt trading for roughly 20 minutes SK Hynix shares are up about 250% since the start of the year due to surging demand for its high-bandwidth memory chips used in AI servers, while Samsung's stock has gained around 149% SK Hynix had also briefly overtaken Samsung as Korea's most valuable company on June 22, the first such shift in 26 years, before this week's selloff Samsung and SK Hynix comprise such an outsized share of the index that the same rally that delivered record gains now exposes Kospi to any wobble in these two stocks This rout is part of a broader global retreat in tech stocks as investors grow uneasy about the scale of AI capex by Big Tech firms, who are collectively planning to spend over $700 billion on AI infrastructure in 2026. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

new_articles.title: Hyundai to recall over 96,000 US vehicles over faulty instrument panel display, NHTSA says
new_articles.summary: Hyundai Motor 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'Hyundai to recall over 96,000 US vehicles over faulty instrument panel display, NHTSA says'이다. Channel NewsAsia is an English-language news organization based in Singapore. June 26 : Hyundai Motor is recalling 96,300 vehicles in the U. S. over a software error that may cause the instrument panel display to fail, the U. National Highway Traffic Safety Administration said on Friday. Here are some details:• An instrument panel display that has failed to show critical safet.

new_articles.title: South Korean stocks in tailspin as Kospi crashes 8%, head for worst week since March
new_articles.summary: Samsung Electronics, SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'South Korean stocks in tailspin as Kospi crashes 8%, head for worst week since March'이다. South Korean stocks experienced a dramatic plunge, exceeding 8% and triggering a trading halt. This sharp decline was primarily driven by a significant selloff in major semiconductor companies like Samsung Electronics and SK Hynix, alongside broader global tech sector weakness. The benchmark KOSPI index is now on track for its worst weekly performance in over three months, despite recent strong gains fueled by AI and chip demand. This sharp decline was primarily driven by a significant selloff in major semiconductor companies like Samsung Electronics and SK Hynix, alongside broader global tech sector weakness The benchmark KOSPI index is now on track for its worst weekly performance in over three months, despite recent strong gains fueled by AI and chip demand South Korea's heavyweight chipmakers led the decline Samsung Electronics and SK Hynix, which together account for more than half of the KOSPI 's market capitalisation, fell more than 9% each Losses also spread to other large-cap stocks, with LG Energy Solution dropping over 7%, while automakers Hyundai Motor and Kia declined sharply. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

new_articles.title: Samsung readies $839 billion investment plan, report says, as AI boom reshapes South Korea
new_articles.summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'Samsung readies $839 billion investment plan, report says, as AI boom reshapes South Korea'이다. Top executives from Samsung and rival SK Hynix will attend a meeting with President Lee Jae Myung on June 29. Top executives from heavyweights including Samsung Electronics and its rival SK Hynix will attend the meeting and lay out investment plans targeting regions beyond Seoul and its surrounding hubs, the report said A presidential adviser said this week that it is in talks ​with Samsung Electronics and SK Hynix on the next phase of large-scale investments in semiconductor ​production facilities to meet exponential growth in AI-driven demand for chips Presidential policy adviser Kim Yong-beom said on Wednesday that SK Hynix and Samsung may need to accelerate projects originally slated for the 2040s into the mid-2030s because AI-driven memory demand was growing faster than expected, leaving no room, power or water in the capital region for subsequent expansion Candidates across multiple regions aggressively pitched their areas as the next semiconductor hub, promising to lure giants such as Samsung and SK Hynix REUTERS More on this topic In South Korea, a job or partner at Samsung, SK Hynix is the new ‘A+’ catch Why can’t Singapore nurture its own Samsung? 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

matched_articles.title: SK Hynix jumps 15% on Nasdaq ADR listing plan
matched_articles.summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'SK Hynix jumps 15% on Nasdaq ADR listing plan'이다. SEOUL -- SK Hynix's shares rallied on the Seoul stock market Thursday, thanks to the chipmaker's detailed plan to list its American depositary receipt. Plan to raise $29 billion and Micron's strong earnings help boost as well. Equities SK Hynix jumps 15% on Nasdaq ADR listing plan Plan to raise $29 billion and Micron's strong earnings help boost as well SK Hynix’s ADR listing on the Nasdaq is expected to rank as the second-largest share flotation in history (Photo by Kotaro Hosokawa) KIM JAEWON June 25, 2026 16:44 JST SEOUL -- SK Hynix's shares rallied on the Seoul stock market Thursday, thanks to the chipmaker's detailed plan to list its American depositary receipts (ADRs), valued about 45 trillion won ($29 billion), on the Nasdaq next month Datawatch SpaceX's debut fires first salvo in new era of mega-IPOs Latest on Equities Equities India's small and mid-cap stocks draw growth-hunting investors Equities SK Hynix eyes raising up to $29bn in Nasdaq ADR listing Equities Tokyo Stock Exchange plans upgrade to double trade volume capacity. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

matched_articles.title: SK Hynix surges 12% after Micron earnings; blockbuster Nasdaq listing
matched_articles.summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'SK Hynix surges 12% after Micron earnings; blockbuster Nasdaq listing'이다. Shares of South Korean chip giant SK Hynix surged 12% on Thursday after the company said it is seeking to raise as much as $29. 4 billion. Micron's quarterly results reinforced expectations that the market for artificial intelligence memory chips remains supply-constrained, a positive signal for fellow memory-chip maker SK Hynix, analysts said "This is a very positive read-across for SK Hynix, who are exposed to the exact same market dynamics," said Rolf Bulk, head of semiconductors and infrastructure at Futurum Group SK Hynix said the ADR listing would broaden its investor base and allow "its true corporate value to be properly evaluated "SK Hynix is one of the clearest ways to gain exposure to AI-driven memory demand, but its Korea-only listing has limited access for many global investors," he told CNBC Shares of SK Hynix are up more than 300% year-to-date. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.
matched_articles.original_title: SK Hynix surges 12% after Micron earnings; blockbuster Nasdaq listing
matched_articles.original_summary: Shares of South Korean chip giant SK Hynix surged 12% on Thursday after the company said it is seeking to raise as much as $29.4 billion.
